name: OLMoE-1B-7B-0924
note: First 100% open sparse MoE LLM (weights, data, code, logs); competitive with much larger dense models like Llama2-13B
tpsNote: Only 1.3B active params make this fast on modest GPUs, though no verified RTX 4090 llama.cpp number was found

results.notes: ARC-Easy score from the same 'Evaluation Snapshot' table on the official HF model card that already sources the model's other 4 benchmark rows (verified by fetching README.md directly).
PIQA score from the same 'Evaluation Snapshot' table on the official HF model card (verified by fetching README.md directly).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via HF model card and arXiv paper (2409.02060, submitted 2024-09-03). Apache-2.0 license confirmed. Architecture (64 experts, 8 active/token, 16 layers, 4096 ctx) confirmed directly from raw config.json. 6.9B total / 1.3B active params confirmed via independent secondary source quoting the paper. All 4 benchmark rows confirmed verbatim on the HF model card. Competitiveness-with-Llama2-13B claim in the note confirmed via paper summaries.
